notes: Menu captured includes happy hour, snacks/starters, soups/salads, mix-and-match lunch, specialty tacos, enchiladas, burritos, entrees, margaritas, sangrias, and dessert. No prices were listed anywhere on the menu text; a bottle/wine list was not present. Seasonal features section referenced but full details not included. Some items noted as available at select locations only.

dishes.name: Squash Blossom Quesadilla
dishes.description: Sautéed squash blossom, roasted poblano, caramelized onion, Monterey Jack & Goat cheese blend, tomatillo salsa, avocado

dishes.name: Sayulita Shrimp Enchiladas
dishes.description: Garlic sautéed shrimp, creamy salsa verde, griddled cheese corn tortilla, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream. Served with refried pinto beans & Mexican rice.

dishes.name: Al Pastor Pork Chop
dishes.description: Pineapple & chile-marinated 12oz bone-in chop, seared cabbage, chipotle aioli, chile-achiote rice, charred jalapeño & pineapple, pickled red onion.

dishes.name: Dip Flight
dishes.description: Creamy three-cheese queso, fresh guacamole, and refried pinto beans & cheese.

dishes.name: Matador Guacamole
dishes.description: Orange-habanero salsa Maya, tomatillo salsa, pico de gallo, queso fresco, cilantro.

dishes.name: Refried Bean Dip
dishes.description: Refried pinto beans, Monterey Jack & cheddar cheeses, cilantro-lime sour cream, green onions.

dishes.name: Queso Con Chorizo
dishes.description: Melted three-cheese house blend, creamy habanero sauce, pico de gallo, cilantro, queso fresco.

dishes.name: Matador Quesadilla
dishes.description: Cheese only or choice of protein with pico de gallo, cilantro-lime sour cream, guacamole, garlic crema, toasted pepitas, garnished with cilantro.

dishes.name: Grande Nachos
dishes.description: House-made tortilla chips layered with jack & cheddar cheese mix, Mexican black beans, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, garnished with green onion. Add choice of protein for additional cost.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; protein add-on at additional cost

dishes.name: Bacon Wrapped Stuffed Jalapeños
dishes.description: Goat cheese, cream cheese, Monterey Jack, roasted garlic, serrano slaw, ranch.

dishes.name: Crispy Brussels Sprouts
dishes.description: Fried Brussels sprouts, peppers & onions, lime, agave vinaigrette, cotija.

dishes.name: Quesabirria
dishes.description: Three corn tortillas, Monterey Jack cheese, beef birria, onions, cilantro, birria jus.

dishes.name: Loaded Bean Dip
dishes.description: Refried pinto beans, queso dip, guacamole, Monterey Jack & cheddar cheeses, pico de gallo, garlic crema, green onions.

dishes.name: Blackened Ahi Tuna
dishes.description: Seared chipotle-seasoned Ahi tuna, ponzu, guacamole, shaved serrano, pickled red onions, sesame seeds, fried corn tostadas.

dishes.name: Street Tacos
dishes.description: Choice of protein (Carnitas, House Chorizo, Beyond Picadillo, Pork Al Pastor, Shredded Chicken) with white onion, cilantro, tomatillo salsa, radish, cotija, and lime on corn tortillas. Boulevard Style: add guacamole and pico de gallo.

dishes.name: Haba Prawns
dishes.description: Fiery habanero sauce, pickled red onions, chile-achiote rice, cilantro.

dishes.name: Crispy Coconut Shrimp
dishes.description: Shredded coconut, chile-flour batter, pickled jalapeño & Fresno chiles, salsa verde, ranch. Available at select locations.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; select locations only

dishes.name: Chicken Tortilla Soup
dishes.description: Roasted chicken, fire-roasted corn, avocado, fried tortilla strips, cotija, cilantro.

dishes.name: Romaine Salad
dishes.description: Cilantro-pepita dressing, toasted pepitas, pico de gallo, cotija, lime.

dishes.name: Taco Salad
dishes.description: Black beans, Monterey Jack, cotija, shredded lettuce, guacamole, pico de gallo, cilantro-lime sour cream, serrano vinaigrette, garlic crema, fried flour tortilla. Choice of protein: Carnitas, House Chorizo, Shrimp, Beyond Picadillo, Pork Al Pastor, Shredded or Grilled Chicken, Marinated Steak.

dishes.name: Wagyu Bacon Cheeseburger
dishes.description: Mixed greens, pico de gallo, bacon, pickled red onions, Monterey Jack & cheddar cheeses, chipotle mayo, chipotle-garlic salt seasoned French fries.

dishes.name: Matador Bowl
dishes.description: Mexican black beans & rice, cheese blend, serrano slaw, pico de gallo, guacamole, garlic crema, radish, fried tortilla strips. Choice of sauce: roja, verde, habanero, or poblano crema. Add: Braised Chicken, Carnitas, Chorizo, Pork Al Pastor, Southwest Veg, or Beyond Picadillo.

dishes.name: Gaucho Bowl
dishes.description: Sautéed peppers & onions, Mexican black beans & rice, Monterey Jack & cheddar cheeses, shredded lettuce, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, pickled red onions. Add: Grilled Chicken, Sautéed Shrimp, or Marinated Steak.

dishes.name: Baja Fish Tacos
dishes.description: Two tacos on flour tortillas with refried pinto beans & rice. Panko crusted and fried Mahi Mahi, serrano slaw, guacamole, chipotle mayo, radish, cilantro, lime.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third taco for $6

dishes.name: Marinated Steak Tacos
dishes.description: Two tacos on flour tortillas with refried pinto beans & rice. Marinated grilled sirloin, Monterey Jack & cheddar cheeses, shredded lettuce, guajillo-garlic sauce, garlic crema, pico de gallo.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third taco for $6

dishes.name: Mango Steak Tacos
dishes.description: Two tacos on flour tortillas with refried pinto beans & rice. Marinated steak, mango-pineapple salsa, serrano slaw, guajillo-chile sauce, Tajin.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third taco for $6

dishes.name: Coconut Shrimp Tacos
dishes.description: Two tacos on flour tortillas with refried pinto beans & rice. Crispy coconut-crusted shrimp, mango-pineapple salsa, pico de gallo, cilantro-lime sour cream, serrano slaw.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third taco for $6

dishes.name: Blackened Fish or Shrimp Tacos
dishes.description: Two tacos on flour tortillas with refried pinto beans & rice. Chipotle chile blackening spice, serrano slaw, tomatillo salsa, pico de gallo, garlic crema.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third taco for $6

dishes.name: Ribeye Tacos
dishes.description: Two tacos on flour tortillas with refried pinto beans & rice. Grilled ribeye, griddled cheese tortilla, chimichurri mayo, avocado, pickled red onions, cotija, cilantro.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third taco for $6

dishes.name: Divorciadas Enchiladas
dishes.description: Two enchiladas with Monterey Jack, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, refried pinto beans & rice. Medium sweet and tangy salsa verde, medium smoky salsa roja, slow braised chicken thigh, corn tortillas.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third enchilada for $4

dishes.name: Habanero Enchiladas
dishes.description: Two enchiladas with Monterey Jack, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, refried pinto beans & rice. Fiery hot habanero salsa, shredded chicken, flour tortillas.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third enchilada for $4

dishes.name: Verde Carnitas Enchiladas
dishes.description: Two enchiladas with Monterey Jack, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, refried pinto beans & rice. Medium sweet and tangy salsa verde, braised carnitas, corn tortillas.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third enchilada for $4

dishes.name: Al Pastor Enchiladas
dishes.description: Two enchiladas with Monterey Jack, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, refried pinto beans & rice. Rich roasted poblano crema, pineapple & chile-marinated pork, corn tortillas.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third enchilada for $4

dishes.name: Shredded Beef Enchiladas
dishes.description: Two enchiladas with Monterey Jack, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, refried pinto beans & rice. Medium and smoky salsa roja, shredded beef birria, flour tortillas.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; add third enchilada for $4

dishes.name: Habanero Steak Burrito
dishes.description: Flour tortilla filled with Mexican black beans & rice, Jack & cheddar cheeses, and sides of serrano slaw, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, garlic crema. Marinated steak, picante habanero sauce. Cali Style – add French fries, avocado, and hot sauce +$3.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; Cali Style add-on +$3

dishes.name: Poblano Carnitas Burrito
dishes.description: Flour tortilla filled with Mexican black beans & rice, Jack & cheddar cheeses, and sides of serrano slaw, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, garlic crema. Braised carnitas, rich and mild crema salsa. Cali Style – add French fries, avocado, and hot sauce +$3.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; Cali Style add-on +$3

dishes.name: Verde Chicken Burrito
dishes.description: Flour tortilla filled with Mexican black beans & rice, Jack & cheddar cheeses, and sides of serrano slaw, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, garlic crema. Braised chicken, chile verde sauce. Cali Style – add French fries, avocado, and hot sauce +$3.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; Cali Style add-on +$3

dishes.name: Beyond Burrito
dishes.description: Flour tortilla filled with Mexican black beans & rice, Jack & cheddar cheeses, and sides of serrano slaw, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, garlic crema. Plant-based protein, medium and smoky salsa roja, caramelized onions, roasted poblanos. Cali Style – add French fries, avocado, and hot sauce +$3.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; Cali Style add-on +$3

dishes.name: Skillet Seared Fajitas
dishes.description: Sautéed peppers & onions, Mexican black beans, Monterey Jack & cheddar cheeses, shredded lettuce, pico de gallo, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, flour or corn tortillas. Choice of: 8oz Marinated Skirt Steak, 8oz Marinated Sirloin Bavette, 10oz Wagyu Top Sirloin, Marinated Chicken Breast, or Shrimp.

dishes.name: Roasted Chile Rellenos
dishes.description: Poblanos stuffed with Mexican rice and Monterey Jack cheese, tomatillo salsa, served with Mexican black beans, poblano crema, garlic crema, pico de gallo, fried tortilla strips. Choice of: Shredded Chicken, Beyond Picadillo, or Carnitas.

dishes.name: Shrimp & Chorizo Paella
dishes.description: Prawns, house chorizo, sautéed peppers & onions, achiote-chile rice, saffron cream.

dishes.name: Arroz con Pollo
dishes.description: Agave-marinated grilled chicken, sautéed peppers, onions & corn, chile-achiote rice, saffron cream, cilantro.

dishes.name: Grilled Carne Asada
dishes.description: Street corn & leeks, grilled peppers, cotija, cilantro, queso fresco, Mexican black beans & rice, flour or corn tortillas. Choice of: 8oz Marinated Skirt Steak, 8oz Marinated Sirloin Bavette, 10oz Wagyu Top Sirloin. Surf and turf options available.

dishes.name: Braised Carnitas
dishes.description: Pork shoulder, guacamole, cilantro-lime sour cream, pico de gallo, pickled red onions, habanero salsa Maya, Mexican black beans & rice, flour or corn tortillas.

dishes.name: Mango-Pineapple Mahi Mahi
dishes.description: Chunky mango & pineapple salsa, fruity salsa verde, serrano slaw, chile-achiote rice, cilantro, lime. Available at select locations.
dishes.price_note: No price listed; select locations only

dishes.name: Fried Ice Cream
dishes.description: Toasted coconut, whipped cream, reposado dulce de leche, cinnamon.

dishes.name: Salted Caramel Brownie
dishes.description: Bittersweet chocolate, salted dulce de leche, vanilla ice cream.
